params.denomination: Must be one of the three fixed denominations.

emergencyUpdateTVL(uint256).details: Only guardian can call in emergency situations.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

pauseWithdrawals().details: Only guardian can pause withdrawals; owner can only unpause.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

params._guardian: The address of the guardian multisig

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

params._newCap: The new maximum TVL allowed during guarded launch

params.denomination: Must match the denomination committed to in the proof circuit.
params.fee: Relayer fee in token units. Bound in proof — cannot be inflated. Public inputs (must match circuit src/kernel/main.nr):   [0] nullifierHash   [1] root   [2] recipient (address as Field)   [3] denomination   [4] relayer   (address as Field)   [5] fee
params.proof: Raw UltraHonk proof bytes from `bb prove`.
params.recipient: Recipient of the funds. Bound in proof — cannot be swapped.
params.relayer: Address to receive `fee`. Set to address(0) for self-relay.
params.root: A known Merkle root (within ROOT_HISTORY_SIZE history).

deposit(bytes32,uint256).notice: Deposit `denomination` tokens. The caller must have pre-approved the contract.

emergencyUpdateTVL(uint256).notice: Emergency function to update TVL in case of accounting mismatch.

isGuardedLaunchActive().notice: Check if guarded launch period is still active

pauseDeposits().notice: Emergency pause deposits. Guardian or owner can call.

pauseWithdrawals().notice: Emergency pause withdrawals. Guardian can call (owner requires higher authority).

remainingCapacity().notice: Get remaining capacity in the vault

setGuardian(address).notice: Set the guardian address (should be 3-of-5 multisig). Only owner.

updateDepositCap(uint256).notice: Update the deposit cap. Only owner during guarded launch.

withdraw(bytes,bytes32,bytes32,address,u.notice: Withdraw a deposit. Requires a valid Noir/UltraHonk ZK proof.
